## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (skill produces incorrect output)
- [ ] Improvement (clearer instructions, better examples)
- [ ] New feature (new section, trigger phrase, or option)
- [ ] Documentation only (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

## Testing

- [ ] Installed updated `SKILL.md` locally (`cp SKILL.md ~/.claude/skills/session-handoff.md`)
- [ ] Started a new Claude Code session after installing
- [ ] Tested with at least one trigger phrase (`session handoff` / `wrap up session`)
- [ ] All 7 required sections appear in the correct order in the output
- [ ] No sections are missing when there is nothing to report (should show "none")
